SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[EmployeeId], [e].[Name] AS [EmployeeName], [t].[SubEmployeeId], [e0].[Name] AS [SubEmployeeName], [t].[Duration], [e].[LeaveBalance] AS [CurrentBalance], [t].[StartDate], [t].[EndDate], [t].[LeaveType], [t].[isDeleted] AS [IsDeleted]
FROM (
    SELECT [l].[Id], [l].[Duration], [l].[EmployeeId], [l].[EndDate], [l].[LeaveType], [l].[StartDate], [l].[SubEmployeeId], [l].[isDeleted]
    FROM [Leaves] AS [l]
    ORDER BY [l].[StartDate] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Employees] AS [e] ON [t].[EmployeeId] = [e].[Id]

    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Employees] AS [e0]
    WHERE [d].[Id] = [e0].[DepartmentId] AND [e0].[isDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)) AS [StaffCount], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Employees] AS [e1]
    WHERE [d].[Id] = [e1].[DepartmentId] AND [e1].[isDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [e1].[ShiftType] = 0) AS [MorningCount], (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM [Employees] AS [e2]
    WHERE [d].[Id] = [e2].[DepartmentId] AND [e2].[isDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [e2].[ShiftType] = 1) AS [NightCount], [d].[ManagerId], CASE
    WHEN [e].[Id] IS NOT NULL THEN [e].[Name]
    ELSE N'لا يوجد مسؤول'
